action.reasoning: First iteration: Set up SegFormer mit-b5 training pipeline on ADE20K. Train for 2 epochs to validate pipeline and measure iteration time. Use standard augmentation (random resize, crop, flip), AdamW optimizer with polynomial LR decay, mixed precision training. Save model with save_pretrained for robust offline loading in predict.py.
